records.question: What allergies are classified exactly as food allergies?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy FROM allergy_type
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'food'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'food'

records.question: What food allergies does Sarah Smith have if she is a 20-year-old female student with advisor 8772?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy FROM allergy_type
JOIN has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.lname = 'Smith' AND allergy_type.allergytype = 'food' AND student.age = 20 AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.advisor = 8772 AND student.fname = 'Sarah'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type
JOIN Has_Allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN Student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'food'
  AND student.lname = 'Smith'
  AND student.age = 20
  AND student.sex = 'F'
  AND student.advisor = 8772
  AND student.fname = 'Sarah'

records.question: What animal allergies does Linda Smith have if she is an 18-year-old female student from BAL with a major of at most 600?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy FROM allergy_type
JOIN has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.age = 18 AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.major <= 600 AND student.fname = 'Linda' AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND allergy_type.allergytype = 'animal'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type allergy_type
JOIN Has_Allergy has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN Student student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'animal'
  AND student.age = 18
  AND student.sex = 'F'
  AND student.city_code = 'BAL'
  AND student.major <= 600
  AND student.fname = 'Linda'
  AND student.lname = 'Smith'

WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'environmental'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'environmental'

records.question: Which environmental allergies does Ian, a student majoring in 520 from NYC with an advisor number at most 7271, have?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy FROM allergy_type
JOIN has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'environmental' AND student.city_code = 'NYC' AND student.fname = 'Ian' AND student.advisor <= 7271 AND student.major = 520
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type allergy_type
JOIN Has_Allergy has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN Student student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'environmental'
  AND student.city_code = 'NYC'
  AND student.fname = 'Ian'
  AND student.advisor <= 7271
  AND student.major = 520
GROUP BY allergy_type.allergy
HAVING COUNT(has_allergy.stuid) > 0

records.question: Which food allergies are reported by students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy FROM allergy_type
JOIN has_allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'food'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT allergy_type.allergy
FROM Allergy_Type
JOIN Has_Allergy ON allergy_type.allergy = has_allergy.allergy
JOIN Student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE allergy_type.allergytype = 'food'
GROUP BY allergy_type.allergy
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT has_allergy.stuid) > 0

JOIN Student ON has_allergy.stuid = student.stuid
